narrative:
Providence Township has 2,427 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points.
